commit_scope: Join Form-native witness-state receipts to heldout learner rows and oracle-retirement proof.

commands: coord join && coord claim "witness heldout learning floor"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/witness-state-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/witness-state-receipt-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validation returned 65535 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The manifest gate returned `PASS-4WAY witness-state-receipt`. The receipt row now emits heldout learner rows for speech-transcribe, vision-describe, multimodal-align, and gpu-readback-kernel, scores champion/challenger history, keeps too-few samples on the third-party teacher, and proves one long-window native win can retire a narrow teacher. No Python receipt helper was extended.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form recipe slice.

phase_gate.gate: Witness-state summaries must become heldout learner rows before native speech, vision, multimodal, and GPU candidates can earn oracle retirement.
phase_gate.next: Feed real STT, vision, multimodal, and GPU oracle labels into the heldout rows from continuous native witness exports.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The witness-state receipt no longer stops at route readiness. Form can create heldout learner rows from live summary counters, score challenger/champion trials, keep the oracle when samples are too few, and retire one narrow teacher only after enough native wins.
test_flows: Speech, vision, multimodal, and GPU readback rows are valid summary-only heldout rows.
Heldout rows lower to champion/challenger trial history.
A long enough native-win window returns native authority.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is Form-native heldout learner row and retirement proof over witness-state summaries. Remaining gaps are real teacher labels, continuous native export, and deeper accelerator receipts.
